# Swear Jar (unfocused.ai)

Swear Jar is an open-source, MIT-licensed novelty tool for seeing how much you
swear at AI and how likely you are to survive the robot uprising. It hooks into
prompts and can inspect supported local recordings/transcripts.

## Privacy

Everything is analyzed locally. The ledger stores word-family counts, not raw
sentences. Opening a hosted report deliberately sends only aggregate metadata:
counts, dollar total, distributions, censored summary words, and uprising
stats. A username or email is associated only when a user logs in or opts into
a public submission.

## Install

```sh
git clone https://github.com/BigLaserCo/swear-jar.git ~/Code/swear-jar
cd ~/Code/swear-jar
node bin/swear-jar.mjs install
node bin/swear-jar.mjs init --local
```

Uninstall hooks with `node bin/swear-jar.mjs uninstall`.

## Scope

The launch detector is English-only. The built-in lexicon avoids racial and
bigoted slurs. Users can add local custom words; reports label them only as
“user-specific.” Dollar examples: darn/heck are $0.10, damn it is $0.25, fuck
is $1, and cunt is $5. This is a toy project supplied as-is; run it at your own
risk.

## Links

- Home: https://swearjar.unfocused.ai/
- Demo: https://swearjar.unfocused.ai/demo.html
- Source: https://github.com/BigLaserCo/swear-jar
- Terms: https://swearjar.unfocused.ai/terms.html
